title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…) with one CLI; ships macOS/Linux/Windows binaries and Docker images.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client (PyPI: ollama) with sync & async generators for chat, embed, pull, list, etc.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) exposing Ollama models for LLM, chat, embeddings and tools.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama WebUI Community)
summary: Feature-rich web interface (React/JS) for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI look-alike.

title: ollama-cli (jmorganca/ollama-cli)
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper for quick model pulls, listing and interactive chat in the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to a local Ollama model—keeps code assistance fully private.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Example repo showing how to plug Ollama models into Chainlit for rapid conversational AI prototypes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama (Maven Central: ollama4j) with synchronous & async APIs and POJO model definitions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama for generation and sentence-transformers for embeddings; includes Gradio demo.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as a provider with decorators for chat, stream and embeddings.

title: ollama-node
summary: Lightweight Node.js wrapper (npm: ollama-node) around the Ollama REST API with TypeScript declarations.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as Generators or Embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# client (NuGet: OllamaSharp) for .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers prompts via Ollama; supports slash commands, message threads and model switching.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal pod autoscaler.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate (ollama-rs) providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API plus CLI example.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside your vault—summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, Q&A on private knowledge.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that routes @bot mentions to Ollama with conversation memory and per-channel model preferences.
